name: Golden Zucchini, Etc. Balti
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub all vegetables and dry them thoroughly.
2. Heat oil in a karahi (wok-style pan).
3. Sauté onions until transparent.
4. Add turmeric, garlic, and chopped dried chilies; stir-fry another minute without burning the garlic.
5. Remove onions and garlic to set aside.
6. Reheat oil slightly.
7. Slice half of the zucchini/courgette into rounds; chop the rest into "matchsticks".
8. Roughly slice and chop the tomatoes, peppers, and chili.
9. Quickly stir-fry all vegetables for about two minutes or until partially cooked.
10. Add onions and garlic back in, then balti sauce.
11. Cook for an additional 5-10 minutes until you achieve your desired consistency.
12. Optionally add white wine or vegetable stock and cook a bit longer until the sauce reduces and thickens again.
13. Serve hot in the karahi with naan bread, or on a plate with rice if preferred.
